ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory location */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the inventory is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the inventory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inventory location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who manages this inventory location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the inventory location */,
  "current_utilization" REAL /* Current utilization percentage of the inventory location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory location (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who manages this warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_utilization" REAL /* Current utilization percentage of the warehouse */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the warehouse (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_num" TEXT /* Part number or identifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the part */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the part was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the part */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part type */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part color */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the part */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the part */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the part */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the part */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the part (if not provided by supplier) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the part */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the part */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the part (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES part_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES part_colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code for the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the part type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the part type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the part type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the supplier (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being priced */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the price */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the part from the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the pricing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the pricing */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for the part from the supplier */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the unit price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_pricing_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES part_suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_pricing_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_quantities" (
  "quantity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantity record */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory location where the part is stored */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part in the inventory location */,
  "is_spare" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the part is a spare part */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quantity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the quantity record */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was last reordered */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the next reorder is expected */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date when the quantity was last physically checked */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the part quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_quantities_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_quantities_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory location where the transaction occurred */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being transacted */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the transaction */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
